description: Welcome home to this renovated, DETACHED, Craftsman style townhome in desirable London Landing. New roof levy $28K paid by sellers.  Renovation over $150K. Teak hardwood on the main, crown mouldings & closet organizers throughout. Spacious updated custom kitchen with plenty of counter space & gas range.  Pottery Barn vanities & new bathrooms. Downstairs has a mancave/flex/movie room. Get cozy with gas fireplaces in the formal sitting room & family room. Covered, south facing porch with additional areas for BBQ & seating. Upper loft with covered deck & Fraser River peek a boo views. Fenced low maintenance Astroturf yard. Oversized garage with epoxy floors & ample storage. Close to top schools, shopping & dyke trails to Steveston Village.
